tasks.title: Add API rate limiting for scrape/OCR
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Rate limits apply to /api/scrape and /api/ocr with 429 responses; limits configurable; does not block health or read-only endpoints

tasks.title: Add API authentication
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Requests require API key header for /api/scrape and /api/ocr; unauthenticated requests get 401; key is configurable

tasks.title: Add combined scrape + OCR endpoint
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Single API call triggers scrape then enqueues OCR job; returns OCR job id; respects max limit caps
